title: Project Timeline Planning
context: You are planning a 12-week project starting 7th April 2025. Key milestones: Research (weeks 1-3), Development (weeks 4-8), Testing (weeks 9-10), Launch (weeks 11-12).

questions.question: What is a 'milestone'?
options: An important point or event in a project
questions.answer: An important point or event in a project

questions.question: What does 'deadline' mean?
options: The latest date something must be completed
questions.answer: The latest date something must be completed

questions.question: What is a 'Gantt chart'?
options: A visual timeline showing project tasks and dates
A type of graph showing sales
questions.answer: A visual timeline showing project tasks and dates

questions.question: Development runs weeks 4-8. How many working days? (5 per week)
Project ends after week 12. End date?
Total calendar days from 7 April to 27 June?
